name: instagram-ingest-apify
description: Requires an Apify account (Apify MCP connected), the Composio MCP server connected to Notion, and your own Instagram cookies (docs/COOKIES.md) — /ig-setup walks you through all three. Give it an Instagram reel/post/carousel URL: the scraping + transcription happens on Apify (no local installs at all — no ffmpeg, no Python venv, no WSL), then Claude extracts the real text and saves a clean, formatted row to your Notion database via Composio.
